description: Single-slide baseline deck with explicit text runs and stable formatting.
risk: Baseline load, cleanup, export, and fidelity path.

description: Single body shape with explicit font family and font size drift.
risk: Mixed explicit font family and font size runs in one body shape.

description: One paragraph containing mixed font runs inside the same paragraph node.
risk: Mixed font runs inside the same paragraph.

description: Bullet-heavy deck with multiple levels and mixed run formatting.
risk: Multiple bullet levels with explicit indentation and mixed run formatting.

description: Two-slide deck with nested bullet lists and repeated indentation patterns.
risk: Nested bullet indentation and repeated list structures.

description: Single-slide bullet list with one explicit bullet-symbol outlier inside an otherwise uniform list.
risk: Bullet symbol normalization evidence on an admitted eligible corpus input.

description: Single-slide bullet list with one isolated deep indentation jump bracketed by same-level siblings.
risk: Bullet indent normalization evidence for a detected jump that should reduce safely on an admitted eligible corpus input.

description: Placeholder-style title and body shapes across multiple slides.
risk: Placeholder-heavy template structures.

description: Dense placeholder-style template with repeated title/body placeholders.
risk: Placeholder-heavy templates with repeated content shapes.

description: Slides containing field nodes alongside text runs.
risk: Field nodes alongside text runs that must preserve token order and content.

description: Deck with theme and slide-master entries but partially inherited text formatting.
risk: Theme inheritance and sparse explicit run formatting.

description: Single-slide deck with one eligible body group whose explicit alignment differs from the dominant body style.
risk: Alignment reduction through dominant-body-style cleanup on admitted corpus input.

description: Single-slide template anchor deck with stable left-aligned body groups and uniform explicit Calibri body text.
risk: Phase 4 recovery anchor for moderate-confidence fingerprint comparison without non-font drift.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one explicit Arial body run inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Calibri body style.
risk: Phase 4 recovery proof surface for a narrow fingerprint-driven font-family experiment.

description: Two-slide template anchor deck with stable left-aligned body groups and uniform explicit Calibri body text across both slides.
risk: Phase 4 recovery anchor for repeated font-family proof across multiple slides.

description: Two-slide companion deck with repeated explicit Arial outlier runs across multiple slides inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Calibri body style.
risk: Phase 4 recovery breadth proof surface for repeated fingerprint-driven font-family experimentation.

description: Single-slide external template anchor deck with stable left-aligned Aptos body groups and uniform explicit 20pt body text.
risk: Phase 4 external-template anchor family for non-self-confirming template matching and known-style normalization proof.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one centered body target inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.
risk: Phase 4 external-template alignment proof surface without same-deck self-confirmation.

description: Single-slide companion deck with one explicit Arial outlier run inside an otherwise identical left-aligned Aptos body style.
risk: Phase 4 external-template font-family proof surface beyond the original Calibri recovery family.

description: Single-slide conflicting external anchor with identical Aptos typography but right-aligned body groups.
risk: Phase 4 external-template blocked and ambiguous selection proof surface with conflicting corroboration.

description: Two-slide deck combining local line-spacing edge outliers and an eligible dominant-body-style line-spacing mismatch.
risk: Line-spacing closure evidence covering both safe local reduction and dominant-body-style reduction on an admitted corpus input.

description: Two-slide deck combining shape-local paragraph-spacing drift with an eligible dominant-body-style paragraph-spacing mismatch.
risk: Paragraph-spacing closure evidence covering both safe local reduction and dominant-body-style reduction on an admitted corpus input.

description: Grouped shapes containing text runs with mixed explicit formatting.
risk: Grouped shapes and nested text bodies.

description: Deck with explicit slide master, slide layout, and theme relationships.
risk: Slide master and slide layout variation entries.

description: Multi-slide robustness deck for optional extended runs.
risk: Larger multi-slide deck for optional robustness coverage outside normal CI.
